It was held on the anniversary of Bishop Blaze.
OccurredOn: It occurred on St Brice's Day.
It occurred on the Feast of the Assumption.
It occurred on Guy Fawkes Day.
UsedIn: It is used in the streets of a town.
UsedTo: It is used to weaken a bull.
It is used to slaughter an animal.
It is used to butcher an animal.
